## Release

### Checklist

- [ ] Update Changelog
- [ ] Version in helm-chart increased
- [ ] Version in pip-package increased
- [ ] Rest-API docs are up-to-date
- [ ] Test with SDK-API-Tester
- [ ] Create Docker-Images
- [ ] Create Release-Tag
